creator: frank.chen2@baesystems.com
text:
run netstat -a -A for a system with ip(ip6) interface, the interface will show as:

Tcpcb     Proto   Recv-Q Send-Q Local Address Foreign Address (state)
c6770ec4   ip 4        0      0 *.*           *.*
c6770ec4   ip64        0      0 *.*           *.*
(for ip6 interfaces)
xxxxxxxx   ip 6        0      0 *.*           *.*
xxxxxxxx   ip66        0      0 *.*           *.*
